tasks.name: Create activity validation schemas
tasks.purpose: Define TypeScript validation schemas for activity recording data to ensure type safety and runtime validation

dependencies: ActivityType enum values from F1 database schema
EntityType enum values from F1 database schema
constraints: Must export ActivityTypeEnum, EntityTypeEnum, RecordActivitySchema
RecordActivitySchema must validate: activity_type, entity_type, entity_id (uuid), metadata (object)
Metadata is optional JSONB object
Follow existing schema patterns from task.schema.ts

tasks.input_state: Feature requirements define activity_type enum values (lesson_complete, quiz_submit, presentation_create, presentation_update, assessment_complete, coaching_booked) and entity_type enum values (lesson, quiz, presentation, assessment, coaching_session)
tasks.output_state: File exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/schema/activity.schema.ts exporting ActivityTypeEnum, EntityTypeEnum, RecordActivitySchema with proper Zod validation
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Schema file exists, exports required schemas, and passes TypeScript compilation with no errors

tasks.name: Create recordActivityAction server action
tasks.purpose: Implement server action for recording user activities with validation, logging, and error handling

constraints: Use 'use server' directive
Wrap with enhanceAction pattern
Use createServiceLogger with service name 'ACTIVITY-SERVICE'
Insert into user_activities table from F1
Include structured logging with context (name, userId, activityType)
Call revalidatePath('/home') after successful insert
Return {success: true, data} on success or {success: false, error} on failure
Graceful error handling - catch and log errors without throwing

tasks.input_state: RecordActivitySchema exists from T1, user_activities table exists from F1 (#1373)
tasks.output_state: File exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/activity-server-actions.ts exporting recordActivityAction function using enhanceAction with schema validation, logging, and revalidation
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Server action file exists, exports recordActivityAction, compiles without errors, and follows enhanceAction pattern with auth:true

tasks.name: Add unit tests for recordActivityAction

action.target: unit test file for activity server action

tasks.purpose: Verify recordActivityAction validates input, handles errors gracefully, and logs correctly

constraints: Test schema validation (invalid activity_type, missing entity_id)
Test successful activity recording
Test error handling for database errors
Mock Supabase client and logger
Verify revalidatePath called on success
Follow existing test patterns in project

tasks.input_state: recordActivityAction function exists and is functional from T2
tasks.output_state: Test file exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/activity-server-actions.test.ts with tests for validation, success, and error cases
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test file exists and all tests pass when running pnpm --filter web test:unit

tasks.name: Create database trigger function for lesson completion
tasks.purpose: Automatically record activity when user_progress table receives lesson completion event

constraints: Use SECURITY INVOKER (inherits RLS, safer than SECURITY DEFINER)
Trigger fires AFTER INSERT on user_progress when progress_percentage = 100
Insert into user_activities with activity_type='lesson_complete', entity_type='lesson'
Extract metadata from user_progress (lesson title, module) if available
Use TG_OP and NEW record access in trigger function
Set search_path = '' for SQL injection prevention

tasks.input_state: user_activities table exists from F1, user_progress table exists with lesson completion tracking
tasks.output_state: PostgreSQL function log_lesson_complete_activity exists and trigger is attached to user_progress table for INSERT operations
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function and trigger exist in migration file, and inserting a completed lesson into user_progress automatically creates a user_activities row

tasks.name: Create database trigger function for quiz submission
tasks.purpose: Automatically record activity when quiz_submissions table receives quiz submission event

constraints: Use SECURITY INVOKER (inherits RLS)
Trigger fires AFTER INSERT on quiz_submissions
Insert into user_activities with activity_type='quiz_submit', entity_type='quiz'
Extract metadata (score, passed status, quiz title) if available
Follow same pattern as T4 lesson trigger
Append to same migration file as T4

tasks.input_state: user_activities table exists from F1, quiz_submissions table exists, lesson trigger migration exists from T4
tasks.output_state: PostgreSQL function log_quiz_submit_activity exists and trigger is attached to quiz_submissions table for INSERT operations in the same migration file
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function and trigger exist in migration file, and inserting a quiz submission automatically creates a user_activities row with quiz metadata

tasks.name: Integrate activity recording into presentation create flow
tasks.purpose: Automatically record presentation_create activity when user creates a new presentation via storyboard

dependencies: createPresentationAction or similar in storyboard server-actions.ts
constraints: Import recordActivityAction
Call recordActivityAction after successful presentation creation
Pass activity_type='presentation_create', entity_type='presentation', entity_id=presentation.id
Include metadata with presentation title
Wrap in try-catch to prevent blocking presentation creation on activity recording failure
Log warning if activity recording fails but don't throw

tasks.input_state: recordActivityAction exists from T2, presentation creation flow exists in storyboard server actions
tasks.output_state: Presentation creation action calls recordActivityAction on success, gracefully handling failures without blocking the primary operation
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Modified server action imports and calls recordActivityAction, compiles without errors, and activity is recorded when creating a presentation
